properties.label: Channel 1
properties.description: Sets the output value (0-255) for DMX channel 1 on the model. Use value curves to animate channel changes over time.

properties.label: Inv
properties.description: When enabled, inverts the output value of DMX channel 1 (255 minus the slider value).
